summary: Iteration 24: 3-feature batch testing complete - OCR auto-fill for invoice image upload, Analytics dashboard page, Dashboard Quick Stats Today vs Yesterday comparison. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/today-vs-yesterday returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: today-vs-yesterday response has today, yesterday, change keys
Backend: today data has sales, expenses, profit, count, cash, bank fields
Backend: yesterday data has sales, expenses, profit, count, cash, bank fields
Backend: change percentages are numeric values for all fields
Backend: POST /api/invoices/ocr-scan validates image requirement (400 on missing)
Backend: POST /api/invoices/ocr-scan accepts base64 image
Backend: GET /api/reports/daily-summary returns list for Analytics
Backend: GET /api/reports/top-customers returns list for Analytics
Backend: GET /api/reports/cashier-performance returns list for Analytics
Backend: GET /api/reports/branch-cashbank returns list for Analytics
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns stats for Analytics
Backend: GET /api/invoices returns list
Frontend: Analytics page loads at /analytics route
Frontend: Analytics title shows 'Analytics Dashboard'
Frontend: Analytics has 6 today-vs-yesterday stat cards with % change badges
Frontend: Analytics shows Key Metrics cards (Avg Daily Sales, Best Day, Slowest Day, Total Revenue)
Frontend: Analytics has Daily Sales vs Expenses bar chart
Frontend: Analytics has Profit Margin Trend area chart
Frontend: Analytics has Cumulative Revenue & Expenses line chart
Frontend: Analytics has Payment Method Distribution pie chart
Frontend: Analytics has Top 5 Customers section with customer data
Frontend: Analytics has Top 5 Cashiers section with cashier data
Frontend: Analytics has Branch Performance Comparison chart
Frontend: Analytics has period selector (Last 7/14/30/90 Days)
Frontend: Analytics is in sidebar under Reports group
Frontend: Dashboard stat cards show 'Today vs yesterday' comparison badges
Frontend: Dashboard cards display '% vs yesterday' change indicators
Frontend: Invoices page has 'Scan Invoice (AI)' button next to New Invoice button
Frontend: Invoices page header has responsive classes (text-2xl sm:text-4xl)
critical_code_review_comments: OCR endpoint uses emergentintegrations with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY to call GPT-4o for image parsing
Today-vs-yesterday endpoint compares ISO date strings from MongoDB with timezone-aware datetime
Analytics page aggregates data from 6 different endpoints: today-vs-yesterday, daily-summary, top-customers, cashier-performance, branch-cashbank, dashboard/stats
Change percentage calculation handles zero values correctly (returns 100 if prev=0 and curr>0, else 0)
Period selector supports 7, 14, 30, 90 days - defaults to 14 days
Top 5 Customers shows transactions count and credit outstanding
Top 5 Cashiers shows branch, transaction count, and avg transaction value
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 complete. New features tested: 1) Analytics page at /analytics - has 6 today-vs-yesterday cards, 4 key metrics cards, 4 charts (bar, area, line, pie), Top 5 Customers/Cashiers sections, Branch Performance chart, period selector (7/14/30/90 days). 2) Dashboard Today vs Yesterday comparison - stat cards now show '% vs yesterday' badges with color coding (green positive, red negative). 3) OCR Scan button on Invoices page - 'Scan Invoice (AI)' button next to New Invoice, uses base64 image upload to /api/invoices/ocr-scan which calls GPT-4o via emergentintegrations.
